scene_input.scene_summary: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Rawāḥah and his men arrive at Khaybar, looking for Usayr.
scene_input.key_visual_action: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Rawāḥah dismounts from his horse

schema_output.scene_summary: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Rawāḥah and his men arrive at Khaybar, looking for Usayr.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 259
schema_output.moral_lesson: Curiosity and exploration can lead to important discoveries.

characters.name: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Rawāḥah
characters.appearance: tall, muscular build, dark hair, wearing a light brown turban and a simple white thobe with a brown woolen cloak draped over his shoulders

characters.name: his men
characters.appearance: various builds, dark hair, wearing simple white thobes with brown woolen cloaks

schema_output.narrative_text: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Rawāḥah and his men arrived at Khaybar, searching for Usayr. They were curious about what they might find.

compliance.notes: No graphic violence, no idols in detail

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast, open desert landscape with rolling sand dunes and sparse palm trees in the distance, under a bright blue morning sky with a few puffy white clouds. In the foreground, a group of men on horses - tall, muscular builds, dark hair, wearing simple white thobes with brown woolen cloaks, and turbans of various colors. One man, the central figure, stands out as he dismounts from his horse, his right foot touching the ground, his left foot still in the stirrup, looking around with a curious expression. His men follow his gaze, looking at the landscape ahead. Soft warm morning light, with a slight gradient of blue in the sky. Medium shot from slightly above. Earthy palette with accents of brown and beige. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
